notificationPolicy: We will notify subscribed customers at least 30 days in advance of any new sub-processor. Subscribe at security@elevay.dev.

subProcessors.name: Supabase
subProcessors.purpose: Primary PostgreSQL database — customer CRM data, mailbox content, conversation history
subProcessors.notes: Data residency in Frankfurt; operator is US-headquartered so US CLOUD Act applies. Sovereign migration target: Scaleway Managed DB (FR) or Infomaniak Postgres (CH).

subProcessors.name: Vercel
subProcessors.purpose: Application hosting, edge functions, scheduled crons
subProcessors.notes: Sovereign migration target: Clever Cloud (FR), Scaleway Serverless, or Infomaniak Cloud Server.

subProcessors.name: Anthropic
subProcessors.purpose: LLM inference for chat, lead scoring, email drafting
subProcessors.notes: We pin to the eu.anthropic.com endpoint. Operator remains US-headquartered. Zero data retention requested by default; data is not used to train Anthropic models per their commercial terms.

subProcessors.name: OpenAI
subProcessors.purpose: Text embeddings for retrieval and search
subProcessors.region: United States (no EU inference endpoint available)
subProcessors.notes: Used only for embeddings. Transferred via SCCs + supplementary measures (minimisation, no PII fields). Sovereign migration target: Mistral Embed (FR).

subProcessors.name: Mistral AI
subProcessors.notes: Activated via LLM_PROVIDER=mistral. EU-capital and EU-hosted, no extraterritorial US exposure.

subProcessors.name: Resend
subProcessors.notes: Sovereign migration target: Brevo (FR) or Mailjet (FR).

subProcessors.name: Stripe
subProcessors.region: United States (data flows) / Ireland (EU billing entity, Stripe Payments Europe Ltd)
subProcessors.notes: Required for card processing. EU customers are contracted under Stripe Payments Europe Ltd (Dublin). Sovereign alternative for SEPA-only: Mollie (NL), GoCardless.

subProcessors.name: Google (OAuth + Gmail API)
subProcessors.purpose: Authentication via Google, read-only access to user mailbox when connected
subProcessors.notes: Structurally non-substitutable: the user's own mailbox lives at Google. The user has already accepted Google's ToS.

subProcessors.name: Microsoft (Entra + Graph + Outlook)
subProcessors.purpose: Authentication via Microsoft, read-only access to Outlook mailbox + Graph calendar
subProcessors.notes: Structurally non-substitutable: the user's own mailbox lives at Microsoft. The user has already accepted Microsoft's ToS.

subProcessors.name: Inngest
subProcessors.purpose: Background job queue and workflow orchestration
subProcessors.notes: Sovereign migration target: BullMQ + Redis on Scaleway/Infomaniak (already partially in place in the worker app).

subProcessors.name: Sentry
subProcessors.region: EU (de.sentry.io — Frankfurt) when configured, US by default
subProcessors.notes: PII scrubbing enabled (sendDefaultPii=false, beforeSend hook). DSN must point to de.sentry.io for EU residency.

subProcessors.name: PostHog
subProcessors.notes: Pinned to EU Cloud. Sovereign alternative: Matomo Cloud (FR) or Plausible (EE) for fully EU-capital operator.

subProcessors.name: Recall.ai
subProcessors.purpose: Meeting bot — joins Zoom/Meet/Teams, records and transcribes
subProcessors.notes: Optional feature; only triggered when the user explicitly connects a meeting calendar. No mature EU-sovereign equivalent exists today; documented gap.

subProcessors.name: Apollo.io
subProcessors.purpose: Contact and company enrichment (B2B firmographic data)
subProcessors.notes: Used only when the user actively triggers enrichment. Sovereign migration target: Datagma (FR), Dropcontact (FR), Pappers (FR data SIRENE), Cognism (UK).

subProcessors.name: EmailEngine (self-hosted)
subProcessors.notes: Open-source software run by Elevay on its own EU/CH infrastructure. Not a third-party sub-processor.

subProcessors.name: Hunter.io / Datagma / Pappers / Firmable
subProcessors.notes: Only activated when API keys are configured. Datagma + Pappers are EU-sovereign; preferred for EU lookups.
